text.title: Architecture Repo Scaffolding Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf either applies a concrete rule or routes to `skip-this-methodology`.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the team have a recurring architecture review cadence?

conclusion.verdict: skip — establish cadence first (route to release-train-coordination)

branch.question: Will fitness functions be executable in CI?

conclusion.verdict: scaffold the repo with canonical dirs + executable fitness
scaffold but block merge until fitness is code, not prose

example.trace: input matches `review_cadence != none` → sub-question → `ci_runnable == true` → conclusion ref=`dirs-canonical`.
